DAILY_BLOCK_SHUFFLE.method: Within each year and product, permute complete intraday normalized price paths across sessions while leaving recipient aggressor-flow features and timestamps fixed.

VOLATILITY_MATCHED_RANDOM_WALK.method: Within each session, generate zero-drift Gaussian close increments using the session's realized one-minute volatility; retain observed flow, volume and timestamps and reconstruct valid OHLC ranges.

YEAR_BLOCK_PERMUTATION.method: Swap normalized August price paths between ordinal-matched 2023 and 2024 sessions for each product while retaining recipient flow and timestamps.

verdict.formula: NULL_RATIO = pooled null pass rate / real pass rate

CONTRE: Only two year blocks make YEAR_BLOCK_PERMUTATION coarse, and a zero real pass count would block rather than falsify the microstructure classes.
